sentences.english: The worst job I ever had was working at a call center.
People would yell at me all day and the pay was terrible.
sentences.korean: 사람들이 하루 종일 소리 질렀고 급여도 형편없었어요.

sentences.english: I worked as a dishwasher in a restaurant, and my hands were always cracked and sore.
sentences.korean: 식당에서 설거지를 했는데 손이 항상 갈라지고 아팠어요.

sentences.english: I delivered newspapers at five AM every morning when I was fifteen, even in the rain and snow.
sentences.korean: 15살 때 매일 아침 5시에 신문을 배달했어요. 비나 눈이 와도요.
